chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Misc. Appln:No.S-684 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-9178/2025 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on MA-8388/2025 4. For hearing of main case. 05.11.2025. Mr. Abdul Jabbar Charan, Advocate for applicant = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal excpeitons. 4. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the applicant of the detainee Mst. Rubina Khatoon is poor and does not have funds or resources and therefore, he seeks indulgence of this Court. Although, he submits that the detainee has been removed from the confines at Darul Aman Qasimabad, Hyderabad and according to information she is presently in Khairpur therefore, he seeks that notice may be issued to the SHO PS Kumb Taluka Kot Diji, District Khairpur Mir’s. The applicant has approached this Court in the first instance, by way of this Criminal Miscellaenous Application. He has not approached the competent forum which has been skipped. Therefore this application is returned to the applicant to be filed before the competent Court whereafter such Court will be at liberty to grant relief to the applicant in accordance with law. The aforesaid application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa 2
